name:
I'm on the edge of a sandy cliff outside
the volcano
description:
I'm on the edge of a sandy cliff outside
the volcano
hints: You're on the edge of a sandy cliff outside the volcano! A beach is visible below.
LOOK DOWN or LOOK CLIF reveals the beach is only 3 meters below. JUMP is surprisingly safe.
JUMP lands you safely on the beach (room 2). E goes to the ledge on the volcano wall. WITH HAND may be fatal.
JUMP=beach (2) safely. E=volcano wall ledge (18). LOOK DOWN shows 3m drop. WITH HAND=possible DEATH.
notes: Sandy cliff edge outside volcano. JUMP=beach (2) safely (3m drop). E=volcano wall ledge (18). WITH HAND may be fatal.
